volumeTitle: The Woman of Andros. The Self-Tormentor. The Eunuch
label: The Eunuch (Section 2.3.317b - Section 2.3.365)

sections.label: Section 2.3.317b
sections.translation: Her age ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.317c
sections.translation: Her age Sixteen .

sections.label: Section 2.3.318
sections.translation: The very flower of youth . [*]

sections.label: Section 2.3.318b
sections.original: Hanc tu mihi vel vi vel clam vel precario
sections.translation: Do you make , it your care to obtain her for me either by force , stealth , or entreaty ; so that I only gain her , it matters not how to me .

sections.label: Section 2.3.320
sections.translation: Well , but to whom does the damsel belong ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.320b
sections.translation: That , i ’ faith , I don ’ t know .

sections.label: Section 2.3.320c
sections.translation: Whence did she come ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.320d
sections.translation: That , just as much .

sections.label: Section 2.3.320e
sections.translation: Where does she live ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.321
sections.translation: Nor yet do I know that .

sections.label: Section 2.3.321b
sections.translation: Where did you see her ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.321c
sections.translation: In the street .

sections.label: Section 2.3.321d
sections.translation: How did you come to lose her ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.322
sections.original: Id equidem adveniens mecum stomachabar modo ;
sections.translation: Why , that ’ s what I was just now fretting myself about ; and I do not believe that there is one individual to whom all good luck is a greater stranger than to myself .

sections.label: Section 2.3.325
sections.translation: What ill fortune this is !

sections.label: Section 2.3.325b
sections.translation: I ’ m utterly undone !

sections.label: Section 2.3.325c
sections.translation: What ’ s the matter ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.325d
sections.translation: Do you ask me ? Do you know Archidemides , my father ’ s kinsman and years ’- mate ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.327b
sections.translation: Why not ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.327c
sections.original: Is dum sequor hanc fit mihi obviam .
sections.translation: He , while I was in full pursuit of her , met me .

sections.label: Section 2.3.328
sections.translation: Unseasonably , upon my faith .

sections.label: Section 2.3.328b
sections.translation: Aye , unhappily , rather ; for other ordinary matters are to be called unseasonable , Parmeno .

sections.label: Section 2.3.330
sections.original: Illum liquet mihi deierare his mensibus
sections.translation: It would be safe for me to make oath that I have not seen him for fully these six or seven months , until just now , when I least wanted , and there was the least occasion . Come now ! isn ’ t this like a fatality ? What do you say ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.333b
sections.translation: Extremely so .

sections.label: Section 2.3.334
sections.original: Continuo accurrit ad me quam longe quidem ,
sections.translation: At once he came running up to me , from a considerable distance ,

sections.label: Section 2.3.335
sections.translation: stooping , palsied , hanging his lip , and wheezing . Halloo , Chaerea ! halloo ! said he ; I ’ ve something to say to you . I stopped . Do you know what it is I want with you ? said he . Say on , said I . To-morrow my cause comes on , said he . What then ? Be sure and tell your father to remember and be my advocate [*] in the morning .

sections.label: Section 2.3.340
sections.original: Dum haec dicit , abiit hora . Rogo numquid velit ?
sections.translation: In talking of this , an hour elapsed . [*] I inquired if he wanted any thing else . That ’ s all , said he . I left him . When I looked in this direction for the damsel , she had that very instant turned this way down this street of ours .

sections.label: Section 2.3.343b
sections.translation: It ’ s a wonder if he doesn ’ t mean her who has just now been made a present of to Thais here .

sections.label: Section 2.3.344b
sections.translation: When I got here , she was nowhere to be seen .

sections.label: Section 2.3.345
sections.translation: Some attendants , I suppose , were accompanying the girl ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.346
sections.translation: Yes ; a Parasite , and a female servant .

sections.label: Section 2.3.346b
sections.translation: It ’ s the very same . ( To CHAEREA .) It ’ s all over with you ; make an end of it ; you ’ ve said your last . [*]

sections.label: Section 2.3.347b
sections.translation: You are thinking about something else .

sections.label: Section 2.3.348
sections.translation: Indeed I ’ m thinking of this same matter .

sections.label: Section 2.3.348b
sections.translation: Pray , tell me , do you know her , or did you see her ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.349b
sections.original: Vidi ; novi ; scio quo abducta sit .
sections.translation: I did see , and I do know her , I am aware to what house she has been taken .

sections.label: Section 2.3.350
sections.translation: What , my dear Parmeno , do you know her ,

sections.label: Section 2.3.350c
sections.translation: and are you aware where she is ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.351
sections.original: Huc deducta est ad meretricem Thaidem : ei dono data est .
sections.translation: She has been brought here ( pointing ) to the house of Thais the Courtesan . [*] She has been made a present to her .

sections.label: Section 2.3.352
sections.original: Quis is est tam potens cum tanto munere hoc ?
sections.translation: What opulent person is it , to be presenting a gift so precious as this ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.352b
sections.translation: The Captain Thraso , Phaedria ’ s rival .

sections.label: Section 2.3.353b
sections.translation: An unpleasant business for my brother , it should seem .

sections.label: Section 2.3.354
sections.original: Immo enim si scias quod donum huic dono contra comparet ,
sections.translation: Aye , and if you did but know what present he is pitting against this present , you would say so still more .

sections.label: Section 2.3.355b
sections.translation: Troth now , what is it , pray ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.355c
sections.translation: A Eunuch . [*]

sections.label: Section 2.3.355d
sections.translation: What ! that unsightly creature , pray , that he purchased yesterday , an old woman ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.357
sections.translation: That very same .

sections.label: Section 2.3.357b
sections.original: Homo quatietur certe cum dono foras .
sections.translation: To a certainty , the gentleman will be bundled out of doors , together with his present ; but I wasn ’ t aware that this Thais is our neighbor .

sections.label: Section 2.3.358b
sections.translation: It isn ’ t long since she came .

sections.label: Section 2.3.359
sections.original: Perii ! numquamne etiam me illam vidisse ? ehodum dic mihi ;
sections.translation: Unhappy wretch that I am ! never to have seen her , even . Come now , just tell me ,

sections.label: Section 2.3.360
sections.translation: is she as handsome as she is reported to be ? [*]

sections.label: Section 2.3.360b
sections.translation: Quite .

sections.label: Section 2.3.360c
sections.translation: But nothing in comparison with this damsel of mine ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.360d
sections.translation: Another thing altogether .

sections.label: Section 2.3.361
sections.original: Obsecro hercle Parmeno fac ut potiar .
sections.translation: Troth now , Parmeno , prithee do contrive for me to gain possession of her .

sections.label: Section 2.3.361b
sections.translation: I ’ ll do my best , and use all my endeavors ; I ’ ll lend you my assistance . ( Going .) Do you want any thing else with me ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.362b
sections.translation: Where are you going now ?

sections.label: Section 2.3.362c
sections.translation: Home ; to take those slaves to Thais , as your brother ordered me .

sections.label: Section 2.3.364
sections.original: O fortunatum istum eunuchum qui quidem in hanc detur domum !
sections.translation: Oh , lucky Eunuch that ! really , to be sent as a present to that house !

sections.label: Section 2.3.365
sections.translation: Why so ?
